prompt: An epic fantasy illustration utilizing a watercolor and ink wash double exposure technique on a vintage parchment background. The overall composition forms the right-facing profile of a man's head. Inside this silhouette is a complex montage of scenes and characters. At the top, a white tree with red leaves stands near a cliffside castle, with a white winged creature flying on the left and a black dragon breathing fire on the right. Below this, a blonde woman sits on a throne made of swords, while a cloaked figure stands on a hill nearby. In the center right, a romantic couple consisting of a blonde woman and a dark-haired man in a fur collar gaze at each other. To their left stands a knight in full plate armor holding a sword. Below them is a group of 3 figures: a man, a young woman, and a child. At the bottom, a large white wolf head is on the left, and a stag stands near a castle on the right. In the bottom center, a flaming heart hovers above 2 crossed swords and 1 golden crown. The muted earthy tones with splashes of red and orange creates a dramatic, legendary atmosphere.
